P1.label: Economic Buyer
P1.cares_about: budget efficiency, ROI, overall influencer investment performance — not tactical creator detail

P2.label: Champion
P2.cares_about: creator selection, briefing quality, campaign execution, operational visibility

P3.label: Junior
P3.cares_about: time saved, fewer manual tasks, easier briefing, less research

tier_1.framing: Real performance gap AND audience sentiment is Negative. Lead with the measurable gap (T1). Sentiment is the REVEAL in the PDF/demo, not stated bluntly in the cold email. Strongest lead — highest priority.

tier_2.framing: Performance gap, sentiment Neutral/Positive. Frame as likely creator/brief mismatch — 'the creator isn't the problem, the setup is'. Lead with the gap.

tier_3.framing: NO performance gap (perf ok). Only differentiator is Negative sentiment, but T2 is barred from first-touch. Use a NEUTRAL curiosity hook ('we noticed something worth a look in how audiences are responding'); do NOT state 'your audience is negative'. The sentiment finding is the demo reveal.

tier_4.framing: Everything looks good — 'here's how to do even better'. Gated behind orchestrator tier_4_enabled (off in v1); message-crafter will only ever see Tier 4 items once that flag is on.

roadmap_unsupported_themes.T3_content_type: Needs content_type/format per post. Source: create_video_analysis MCP -> a future video-analyser skill.
roadmap_unsupported_themes.T4_ai_video: Needs hook_rating / caption_rating / retention curve. Source: get_video_analysis MCP -> video-analyser skill.
roadmap_unsupported_themes.T5_full_ai_coach: Needs full creator profile breakdown. Source: create_profile_analysis MCP. v1 ships T5_lite (light profile insight from per-creator baseline + overall_profile_sentiment only).
roadmap_unsupported_themes.T6_competitor: Needs competitor brands' influencer activity + performance_gap_%. Source: a separate competitor-analysis run across OTHER brands. ~22 T6 merge fields are unpopulatable today.

avoid: generic SaaS language or product-feature descriptions
explaining the AI upfront (the AI is the credibility mechanism, not the hook)
blaming the recipient for past decisions
over-explaining the diagnosis (the curiosity gap drives the reply)
heavy formatting, buzzwords, aggressive sales language

intros.hard_el:
Ονομάζομαι {sender_name} και είμαι από την Renfluence, μια πλατφόρμα που χρησιμοποιεί AI για να παρακολουθεί και να αναλύει οπτικοακουστικό περιεχόμενο.

Πριν σας γράψω αυτό το email, η πλατφόρμα μας έχει ήδη αναλύσει το οπτικοακουστικό υλικό της {company} σε Instagram και TikTok.
intros.soft_el:
Καλησπέρα {contact_first_name},
Είμαι ο/η {sender_name} από την Renfluence.
intros.hard_en:
My name is {sender_name}, from Renfluence — an AI platform that tracks and analyses audiovisual content.

Before writing to you, our platform had already analysed {company}'s audiovisual content on Instagram and TikTok.

general_el: Παρατηρήσαμε ένα pattern στα influencer campaigns σας
Αυτό μας τράβηξε την προσοχή στα recent videos σας
T1_el: Παρατηρήσαμε ένα pattern στα branded videos σας
Πώς συγκρίνονται τα branded videos σας στον κλάδο
general_en: We noticed a pattern in your influencer campaigns
This caught our eye in your recent videos
T1_en: We noticed a pattern in your branded videos
How your branded videos compare in your category

P1_el: Νομίζω αξίζει να το δείτε πιο συγκεκριμένα.
Θέλετε να σας δείξω σύντομα σε ένα call τι εντοπίσαμε;
P2_el: Το έχετε δει κι εσείς αυτό;
Νομίζω αξίζει να το δείτε πριν το επόμενο brief.
P3_el: Θες να σου δείξω τι βλέπουμε εκεί;
Νομίζω θα σου γλιτώσει αρκετό manual ψάξιμο.
Αν θες, μπορώ να σου δείξω τι pattern βρήκαμε.
P1_en: I think it's worth a closer look.
P2_en: Want me to show you what we found?
Might be worth a look before your next brief.
P3_en: Want me to show you what we're seeing?
It'd save you a fair bit of manual digging.
If you like, I can show you the pattern we found.

cta_benefits_el: Πλήρης ανάλυση όλων των campaigns σας, όχι μόνο των flagged
Sentiment ανά creator, post και πλατφόρμα
Σύγκριση με benchmarks του κλάδου σας
AI διάγνωση hook, caption και content format
Προτάσεις για το επόμενο brief σας
cta_benefits_en: Full analysis of all your campaigns, not just the flagged ones
Sentiment by creator, post and platform
AI diagnosis of hook, caption and content format
